data.title: EmCoin taps Crypto.com exchange to expand crypto trading for UAE users
data.description:

According to the Singapore-based crypto exchange’s press statement released on Thursday, the partnership will enable EmCoin users to […]

data.title: David Sacks urges industry action as U.S. crypto market structure bill nears passage
data.description:
White House adviser David Sacks is urging the crypto industry to use a sudden pause in Senate action on a U. S. crypto market structure bill to close remaining gaps in the legislation. While the delay has pushed back the committee’s timetable and left the next hearing date unspecified, Sacks said that passage of the bill […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/david-sacks-call-action-on-cryptomarket-bill/

data.title: CFTC Faces Challenges in Expanding Crypto Regulation Amid Market Growth
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Selig has assumed the role of chairman of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) during a pivotal time as the agency seeks to expand its regulatory authority over crypto assets and address the rapid growth of prediction markets. Currently, platforms like Kalshi see over 90% of their trading volume from sports predictions, and the CFTC's stance on limiting prediction markets remains unclear. Selig, who has previously opposed restrictions on sports betting, will face multiple challenges, including court litigation, personnel restructuring, and resource shortages within the regulatory body. The CFTC is expected to enhance protection for retail traders and carefully evaluate policy directions related to crypto and prediction markets.

data.title: Polymarket whale wallets go dark as Trump claims Venezuelan leakers are in jail
data.description:
Three Polymarket wallets were closely scrutinized for making outsized gains and betting just ahead of the US operation in Venezuela. One wallet was deleted, the other became inactive, while the third whale made a new bet on the situation in Iran.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/polymarket-whale-trump-venezuela-leaks/

data.title: Alchemy Pay adds Dash to fiat on-ramp
data.description:
Alchemy Pay, a payment gateway, has integrated Dash (DASH) into its fiat on-ramp service, now allowing users to buy the cryptocurrency directly using local fiat payment methods. The integration, announced on January 13, and lets users to buy DASH across 173 countries using more than 50 fiat currencies and over 300 payment channels, including card payments, mobile wallets, and regional bank transfers. Alchemy Pay said the move is intended to lower barriers for users seeking access to Dash as a payment-focused cryptocurrency. Expanding access to Dash through global payment rails Dash is designed for fast, low-cost digital payments and has introduced features such as decentralized governance, masternodes, and instant transaction finality
source: https://finbold.com/alchemy-pay-adds-dash-to-fiat-on-ramp/

data.title: A whale deposited $2.27 million into Hyperliquid to go long on XMR.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xf35a...338a) deposited 2.27 million USDC into Hyperliquid and opened a long position in XMR with 2x leverage. The position is still increasing.

data.title: CBN: The earliest statute of limitations for retroactive taxation on overseas income can be extended to 2017.
data.description: Currently, the tax retrieval period for overseas income of mainland Chinese tax residents has been extended compared to before, extending as far back as 2020 or even 2017. Since 2025, many tax residents have received notices and reminders from tax authorities, requiring them to conduct self-assessments of their personal income both domestically and internationally and to file tax returns in a timely manner. The scope of tax retrieval mainly covers the past three years, primarily 2022 and 2023. (CBN)

data.title: Trust Wallet Begins Compensation for Security Incident
data.description: According to PANews, Trust Wallet has announced the commencement of compensation for its browser extension v2.68 security incident. The first batch of eligible users has already received compensation, with approximately 95% of affected funds' claims submitted. The remaining claims will be processed within 30 days. Users are advised to immediately discontinue use of the affected wallets and transfer their assets, with tools integrated into the updated extension and mobile app. Continuing to use compromised wallets will be at the user's own risk. The deadline for compensation applications is February 14.

data.title: Why Is Ocular Therapeutix (OCUL) Stock Up Premarket Today? Sanofi Bid Rejection Fuels Rally
data.description:
Ocular Therapeutix stock jumped over 18% in premarket trading after rejecting Sanofi’s $16 per share buyout offer, as investors turned bullish on the company’s late-stage pipeline.
source: https://tokenist.com/why-is-ocular-therapeutix-ocul-stock-up-premarket-today-sanofi-bid-rejection-fuels-rally/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=why-is-ocular-therapeutix-ocul-stock-up-premarket-today-sanofi-bid-rejection-fuels-rally

data.title: OKX's "Flash Earn" product will launch Fogo (FOGO), offering a chance to share in 10 million FOGO airdrop rewards.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Flash Earn" product will list Fogo (FOGO) from 22:00 on January 15, 2026 to 22:00 on January 22, 2026 (UTC+8). During the event, users can participate in the subscription by locking OKB, USDG, BTC, or ETH to share a reward of 10,000,000 FOGO tokens. This event supports participation in multiple currencies. Users can access the event page through OKX App's top left corner—Earn & Rewards—Flash Earn.

data.title: An address minted over 100 million D coins, worth $1.286 million.
data.description: According to on-chain data, an address (0xae579C73...c90a47C9E) received 100,109,055.4 DAR Open Network (D) tokens today, minted and transferred from an empty address (Null: 0x000...000). According to CoinMarketCap real-time data, the maximum and total supply of D tokens are both set at 800 million. Prior to this large-scale minting, its circulating supply had reached 743 million, and its circulating market capitalization was extremely close to its fully diluted valuation (FDV). This minting action essentially brings the project to full circulation. Currently, these tokens are worth approximately $1.286 million at a price of $0.01286 each.

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer to FalconX Identified
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 20:19, a total of 149,999.9 SOL was transferred from an anonymous address, beginning with 34bHts, to FalconX.
